TERMS AND CONDITIONS
Alpha Freight Mock
Load Number: AFM-LOAD-1001

Payment Summary
Linehaul: $2,450.00
Detention policy: $50 per hour after two free hours.
Layover policy: $250 per day if approved.
Truck ordered not used: $150 if canceled after dispatch.
Quick pay fee: 2 percent deduction.

Carrier agrees to submit all paperwork within 24 hours.
Failure to provide paperwork may delay payment.
This page is not a new load confirmation.
